_source.name: HSK 3.0 (国际中文教育中文水平等级标准, 2021) vocabulary list
_source.note: OCR of the official MoE PDF. Parsed 11092 entries = the official total; the 7-9 band parsed to 5636 = the official count. Part-of-speech annotations (（形）) and homograph superscripts stripped; a word listed in several bands keeps its LOWEST band.

_bands.7: HSK 7-9 (merged advanced band; HSK does not subdivide it)
